creator: oscnet@yeah.net
text:
when use 3.4 stable the netcard work well.
but when I change to 4.0 stable it do not work.
the program probe ok at 3.4 as half-duplex,100M,
but in 4.0 stable it probed as  not half-duplex,100M
I think it is only finded by my netcard.

/kernel: mx0: <Macronix 98715/98715A 10/100BaseTX> rev
/kernel: mx0: Ethernet address: 00:00:e8:77:81:94
/kernel: mx0: autoneg complete, link status good (half-duplex, 100Mbps)      

dc0: <Macronix 98715/98715A 10/100BaseTX> port 0x6000-0x60ff mem 0xe4000000-0xe40000ff irq 11 at device 3.0 on pci0
/kernel: dc0: Ethernet address: 00:00:e8:77:81:94
/kernel: miibus0: <MII bus> on dc0
/kernel: dcphy0: <Intel 21143 NWAY media interface> on miibus0
/kernel: dcphy0:  10baseT, 10baseT-FDX, 100baseTX, 100 baseTX-FDX, auto
